githubMetadata.description: A utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development.

repoSummary: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS engine designed to generate custom styling declarations directly from HTML templates and JS code file classes by parsing stylesheet roots on compile passes.

messages.content: Welcome to **tailwindlabs/tailwindcss** 🗺️ workspace! This is a pre-analyzed demo repository. You can explore its files, look at the dependency graph, or select any files in the explorer.
Explain the entry points of the compiler

The compiler execution is initiated inside the PostCSS pipeline located in `src/postcss.ts`. This plugin calls `compile(root)` in `src/compiler.ts`, which parses custom configurations using the parser engines in `src/parser.ts` to transform utility class syntax into standardized static CSS rules.
